name: Iceland (presidential standard)

colors.symbolism: the field of the state flag
the cross fimbriation and the central shield

description: The Icelandic state flag (swallow-tailed Nordic-cross flag) defaced in the centre with the coat of arms of Iceland — a silver shield with red cross fimbriated white, supported by the four traditional landvættir (land-spirits).
history: The standard of the President of Iceland, used by the head of state since the establishment of the republic on 17 June 1944.

features.role: Coat of arms of Iceland (with the four landvættir)
